plugins.name: shortcut
plugins.description: Auto-dispatch skills and commands when the user types a magic word.

plugins.name: git-committer
plugins.description: Assists in creating clear and concise git commit messages.

plugins.name: spec-writer
plugins.description: Writes technical specifications with architecture diagrams, collaborating with proj-ideatender and ascii-grapher.

plugins.name: agent-ellis
plugins.description: Code reviewer agent — reviews code quality and security, reports findings to proj-ideatender or agent-hale.

plugins.name: proj-ideatender
plugins.description: Project owner agent — analyzes project context and produces brief plans for the team.

plugins.name: agent-smith
plugins.description: Team leader agent — dispatches planning, spec-writing, coding, and review jobs to specialized agents.

plugins.name: ascii-grapher
plugins.description: Draw ASCII diagrams for architecture, flows, and concepts.

plugins.name: agent-hale
plugins.description: Programmer agent — writes clean, focused code based on plan and spec from the team.
